title: Qeyniy #7017
definition:
Kenite = "smiths"

 1) the tribe from which the father-in-law of Moses was a member and
    which lived in the area between southern Palestine and the mountains
    of Sinai
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kenite = "smiths"

 1) the tribe from which the father-in-law of Moses was a member and
    which lived in the area between southern Palestine and the mountains
    of Sinai

    NASB:  members of the tribe of Kenites
